summary: Meal delivery subscription management app with subscriber management (name, subscription start/end dates, delivery days of the week), ingredients tracking, and stable storage on the Internet Computer for data persistence across sessions and tabs.
architectural_notes: Use Internet Computer stable storage for all data persistence to survive sessions and page refreshes
known_issues: Repeated build failures — AI unable to complete full app build; multiple retries attempted
Saved details (records, ingredients) not showing across all tabs — data persistence issue

existing_features.title: Fix the IngredientForm component so that submitting the form calls the createIngredient or updateIngredient backend mutation and upon success invalidates the ingredients query cache, causing IngredientList to re-render with the latest data.

Ensure all React Query hooks in useQueries.ts correctly wire to the stable backend actor methods for ingredients, recipes, customers, subscriptions, invoices, and plans — so data fetched from the canister is displayed consistently across all app tabs (Inventory, Subscriptions, Customers, Menu, Sales, Plans).
Preserve all existing page tabs and their routing: Dashboard, Subscriptions, Customers, Inventory, Menu, Sales, and Plans — keeping the current navigation structure in Layout.tsx intact.

new_feature_requests.summary: Subscriber management with name, subscription start/end dates, and delivery days of the week
Ingredients tracking with reliable save functionality
Stable storage on the Internet Computer so all records persist across sessions, refreshes, and tab navigation
Ensure all backend stable variables use `stable` keyword for Ingredients, Recipes, Customers, Subscriptions, Invoices, and Plans so data persists across canister upgrades and page refreshes.

Implement full CRUD backend endpoints for Ingredients: createIngredient, getIngredients, updateIngredient, deleteIngredient — ensuring each operation correctly reads from and writes to stable storage.
Implement full CRUD backend endpoints for Customers: createCustomer, getCustomers, updateCustomer, deleteCustomer — with stable storage.

Implement full CRUD backend endpoints for Subscriptions: createSubscription, getSubscriptions, updateSubscription, deleteSubscription — storing name, subscription start date, end date, and delivery days of the week per subscriber in stable storage.
Implement full CRUD backend endpoints for Plans: createPlan, getPlans, updatePlan, deletePlan — with stable storage.
Implement full CRUD backend endpoints for Recipes: createRecipe, getRecipes, updateRecipe, deleteRecipe — with stable storage.
Implement full CRUD backend endpoints for Invoices: createInvoice, getInvoices, getInvoicesByCustomer — with stable storage.

Generate a migration.mo that upgrades any existing subscription day records, preserving the tri-state status variant (#delivered, #missed, #pending) and migrating any legacy boolean `delivered` fields during canister upgrade.
